title: reseda lutea subvar. hispidula
intro: Reseda lutea subvar. hispidula, also known as yellow rocket, is a plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae and is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. Reseda lutea subvar. hispidula can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications for its medicinal properties.
